subject: Criminal Law
module: Public Order, Offences Against Justice, and State Offences

lessons.title: Public Order Offences
lessons.description: Let us begin with the structure of the Act, because it is important to understand the architecture before diving into individual offences.

lessons.title: Offences Against Justice and State Offences
lessons.description: Let us begin with perjury. For most of Irish legal history, perjury was a common law offence — there was no dedicated statute.
